chunks.title: David and Bathsheba
chunks.reason: Introduces the setting and describes David seeing Bathsheba and taking her.

chunks.title: David and Uriah
chunks.reason: Describes David's attempts to hide the pregnancy through dialogue with Uriah.

chunks.title: Death of Uriah
chunks.reason: Details the letter sent to Joab and the subsequent report from the messenger.

chunks.title: Marriage and Conclusion
chunks.reason: Describes Bathsheba's mourning, her marriage to David, and the narrative conclusion.
